profile.title: User Profile
profile.session_hint: Sign out of your current session or switch accounts at any time.
profile.financial_profile_hint: Define your actual situation: income, fixed expenses, and debts.
profile.language_hint: Select your preferred language for the application interface.

kpi.health_tooltip:
Calculated starting from 100 points and penalized if:
• Fixed expenses: exceed 35%.
• Savings: are less than 20%.
• Desires/Leisure: exceed 30%.
kpi.balance_tooltip: Visually compares the weight of leisure against your savings. Ideally, the green part (Savings) should be significantly larger than the yellow part (Leisure).

models.free_desc: Manage your budget freely without following any strict metrics.
models.balance_desc: The classic 50/30/20 rule. Prioritizes a balanced life: enjoying the present while securing 20% for the future.
models.accelerator_desc: Extreme focus on saving/investing (50% goal). Requires drastically reducing whims to achieve fast goals.
models.lifesaver_desc: Temporary survival mode. Eliminates leisure to recover liquidity and cover vital needs.
models.rescue_desc: Emergency mode to pay off suffocating debts. Total sacrifice of desires in favor of paying obligations.

mirror.title: FUTURE MIRROR (12 MONTHS)
mirror.tooltip: Linear projection of your accumulated monthly savings over a year.
mirror.cushion_desc: Your current savings would cover your expenses for this time.

analytics.title: Analytical Forecasts
analytics.subtitle: PROJECTION_HUD: ACTIVE // OPTIMAL ROUTE CALCULATED
analytics.debt_allocation: Percentage of Savings to pay debts:
analytics.empty_chart: Add debts in the top panel to see the projection
analytics.timeline_empty: Milestones will be generated automatically when you add debts.

balance.none: No margin for savings or leisure.
balance.critical: Critical: You spend on leisure but fail to save anything.
balance.excellent: Excellent: You prioritize savings far above your whims.
balance.controlled: Controlled: You allocate to leisure an equivalent to {ratio}% of what you save.
balance.warning: Alert: Your leisure expenses exceed your savings by {overflow}%.
balance.danger: Danger: Your whims multiply what you save by {multiplier} times.

financial_profile.page_sub: Engine Room · Define your current economic reality
financial_profile.save_success: ✓ Data synchronized successfully with the database.
financial_profile.debt_subtitle: Add each debt separately for precise projections.
financial_profile.no_debts: No registered debts. Add the first one below.

investments_page.no_positions: You currently have no open positions.
